title: Peppa Pig: Sports Day
description: Peppa and her friends are taking part in Sports Day and they want you to join them! Fans of the TV show will love this sports day-inspired app, which encourages pre-schoolers to explore fun filled games with their favourite little piggy. 5 x fun-filled games featuring Peppa, George and their family and friends: • Bicycle Race • Obstacle Course • Tug of War • Long Jump • Ice Cream Maker Plus special Sports Day features, such as: • Rosette Maker • Earn Sticker Rewards
